name: Sunset Mirror Ghagra Set
description: Vibrant mustard lehenga with a mirror-work blouse and a matching open jacket. Ideal for mehendi and festive events.
stylistNotes: Pair it with oxidized jewelry and juttis for a playful, ethnic vibe.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Store in a muslin cloth.

name: Royal Yellow Embroidered Lehenga
description: Opulent yellow lehenga with silver embroidery, matched with a baby pink net dupatta.
stylistNotes: Best styled with Kundan jewelry and nude makeup.
materialCare: Professional dry clean only. Handle with care.

name: Golden Peplum with Hot Pink Sharara
description: Designer mustard peplum top with intricate embroidery and contrasting hot pink sharara pants.
stylistNotes: Perfect for sangeet night. Add jhumkas and bold lips.
materialCare: Dry clean only. Keep folded in tissue paper.

name: Bandhani Fusion Lehenga
description: Rajasthani-inspired lehenga with mirror work and multicolor border. Unique saree-style drape.
stylistNotes: Ideal for haldi functions. Go for a sleek braid and bold bangles.
materialCare: Gentle hand wash or dry clean.

name: Tangerine Silk Saree
description: Classic orange saree with minimal embellishments, perfect for haldi or puja ceremonies.
stylistNotes: Pair with floral jewelry and a subtle bun.
